name: cts-faststa-sta-adapter-boundary-refactor
title: CTS FastSTA and STAAdapter boundary refactor
description: Clarify and refactor CTS FastSTA versus STAAdapter responsibilities: rename FastStaAdapter to FastSTA, keep the existing STAAdapter data dependency explicit, remove legacy STA char-only surface, unify net-cap and buffer/sink slew legality, make root slew explicit, and leave module/timing unchanged.
creator: dawnli
